name: best friend | jaehyun
description:
Inspired by Conan Gray’s, “Heather” ||☕️ | Your best friend, Jaehyun, is stupid, but that’s why you love him. Best friends since, forever, you guys have been inseparable. Every day, you guys goof around and spend hours together — and when he leaves, you feel a void in your heart. You’re in love with Jaehyun, but he’s in love with somebody else. The way he becomes memorized by her, his smile widens a little when she’s around, and you can only sit there and wish you were Heather.

↬ Thank you for the amount of support you’ve all shown me!!

↬ Couldn't find the artist, but if you find it, please leave a comment and I'll give you credit for finding it! :))
